a:T4f75,<div class="question">
<p>In the electrolysis apparatus shown, 0.59 g of Ni is deposited on the cathode of the first cell.</p>
<p style="text-align:center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p>What is the mass of Ag deposited on the cathode of the second cell?</p>
<p><br/>A.  0.54 g</p>
<p>B.  0.59 g</p>
<p>C.  1.08 g</p>
<p>D.  2.16 g</p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/chemistry/topic/19/","children":["← back to ","Chemistry"," topic ","19"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"22M.1.HL.TZ1.31"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Chemistry"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"22M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","19-1-electrochemical-cells"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>D</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>A poorly answered question with low discrimination factor.
